Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Statistics Archives Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

7 Payson Nietert

  • Position Forward
  • Height 6-7
  • Weight 190
  • Class Freshman
  • Hometown Marion, Iowa
  • Highschool Linn-Mar HS
  • Bio
  • Stats

Biography

2025-26: Played in five games as a reserve forward averaging 2.2 points and 0.4 rebounds a game...played season-high 10 minutes, scoring six points with one rebound vs. Manhattan Christian (11/17/25)... scored three points and played for five minutes vs. Northern State (1/9/26).

High School:  Graduate of Linn-Mar High School in Iowa...three-year starter for the Lions....averaged 10.9 points and 4.5 rebounds per game, shooting 48 percent from the field in helping team to 22-3 record (14-0 in Mississippi Valley Conference) and state semi-finals in Class 4A...earned Class 4A Third Team All-State honors from Iowa Print/Sports Writers Association as a senior to go with All-Metro and All-Mississippi Valley Conference First Team honors...during junior season produced 10.5 points and 5.0 rebounds per contest and shot 85 percent from the free throw line to receive All-Metro Conference First Team and All-MVC Second Team recognition...had a 40-point game in junior season with nine 3-pointers that tied school record held by former Iowa Hawkeye Jordan Bohanon...was a three-time All-Conference Academic Team selection and earned the Iowa Bankers Association Student Athlete Achievement Award.

Personal:  Parents are Joe and Amber Neitert...born August 14, 2006...major in psychology.

Statistics
